description: A Binance Angel shares their journey of joining the Binance Angel program to support the community and learn more about crypto. They discuss their experiences and the importance of contributing to the crypto community.
topic_summary: The video explores the motivations and experiences of a Binance Angel, highlighting community support and personal growth in the crypto space. Key moments include joining the program [t=4:24], the application process [t=59:75], and reflections on their journey [t=66:91].
